shipping.summary: International shipping times depend on the products and destination (estimated at checkout).

tax.summary: If you have a faulty/damaged item, please contact customer service to see how we can help you.

fee.summary: No printer needed!You'll need the order number from your confirmation email.For a refund on purchases made in the UK via the Footpatrol website or 'Footpatrol' app, you can send any unwanted items back to us within 28 days for FREE via EVRi or at a £2 cost via Royal Mail.

result.overall_note: Local rule-based extraction from official policy pages.
